notes: Atlassian develops Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, and other collaboration tools widely used in enterprises. Atlassian products are frequent targets — Confluence vulnerabilities in particular have been exploited by nation-state actors.

data.description: Security advisories for Atlassian products (Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, etc.).
data.notes: Advisories can be looked up by CVE identifier or Jira issue ID (e.g., CONFSERVER-92475). The Jira instance at jira.atlassian.com provides the primary lookup.

data.note: Atlassian advisories page lists by CVE, but individual advisory URLs use Jira issue IDs. See the advisories page at atlassian.com/trust/security/advisories.

examples.note: Critical Confluence privilege escalation — exploited by nation-state actors
